arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford issues five-word message after Man United's victory over Fulham - as Ruben Amorim says he'd rather play his goalkeeper coach
arts.sum: Lisandro Martinez's strike secured a slender 1-0 victory for Amorim's side on a night when strikers Rasmus Hojlund and Joshua Zirkzee again failed to make an impact.

arts.ttl: “I don’t know” – Ruben Amorim’s confusing reply when asked about Man United star
arts.sum: Manchester United won against Fulham in the Premier League on Sunday thanks to a goal from defender Lisandro Martinez. It was not an impressive performance from Ruben Amorim’s side but they still managed to come out on top against a determined Fulham side. The Red Devils are still in the bottom half of the Premier […] The post “I don’t know” – Ruben Amorim’s confusing reply when asked about Man United star appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe got a first-hand view of Manchester United transfer priority at Fulham
arts.sum: Man Utd beat Fulham 1-0 at Craven Cottage to earn an eighth Premier League win of the season in unconvincing fashion.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: €70m star wants Manchester United transfer after another deal fell through
arts.sum: Chelsea forward Christopher Nkunku is understood to be keen on a potential transfer to Manchester United after another move collapsed. Sources with a close understanding of the situation have informed CaughtOffside that Nkunku had more or less agreed terms with Bayern Munich, but an agreement could not be struck with Chelsea. The Blues have set […] The post Exclusive: €70m star wants Manchester United transfer after another deal fell through appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Man Utd's five worst January transfers of all time
arts.sum: Possebon joined Braga on loan in July 2009 and his spell at Man Utd ended when he signed for Santos on a free transfer in 2010. The former Italy U20 international moved to Old Trafford from SC Internacional for €3.5m in 2008, but he only made eight first-team appearances for the Red Devils.

arts.ttl: I saw Rasmus Hojlund reaction that showed Manchester United don't always play to his strengths
arts.sum: Man Utd produced a forgettable performance at Fulham but Lisandro Martinez's deflected goal earned them a vital Premier League victory.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim rejected players' day off request after Manchester United victory vs Fulham
arts.sum: Man Utd won 1-0 against Fulham in the Premier League at the weekend to give Ruben Amorim an early birthday gift.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim hints at new Manchester United role for Lisandro Martinez and makes Rasmus Hojlund admission
arts.sum: Lisandro Martinez did the attacking for Man United on a night their striker Rasmus Hojlund failed to score for the 11th game running.

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Marcus Rashford theory emerges as Ruben Amorim handed major blow
arts.sum: After Manchester United's 1-0 win over Fulham, Ruben Amorim might be optimistic that his team are starting to adapt to his methods - but he will still be keen to secure a new signing before deadline day

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim can enjoy his birthday knowing the Man United fans are behind him, writes CHRIS WHEELER… unlike Sir Jim Ratcliffe who has a new X-rated chant
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER: And here on a soggy night at Craven Cottage was another win to lift his spirits and celebrate his birthday with a smile on his face.
